title: Ships shun Strait of Hormuz as renewed fighting strains key oil corridor
summary: Vessel traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has declined significantly following Trump's blockade implementation last week, impacting a critical global oil corridor. The slowdown could affect global energy prices and shipping patterns. This reflects geopolitical tensions affecting essential energy infrastructure.
content: Vessel traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has slumped since U.S. President Donald Trump's blockade took effect last week.

zh.title: 船只避开霍尔木兹海峡 新爆发的战斗加剧关键石油走廊压力
zh.summary: 上周特朗普实施封锁后，通过霍尔木兹海峡的船舶交通量大幅下降，冲击了全球关键石油走廊。这一放缓可能影响全球能源价格和航运模式。这反映了影响关键能源基础设施的地缘政治紧张局势。

title: U.S. condemns China's 'dangerous and aggressive' acts after Philippine sailor injured at disputed shoal
summary: A Philippine sailor was injured at a disputed shoal, prompting U.S. condemnation of China's actions. The incident occurs amid regional diplomatic meetings involving Southeast Asian and Chinese officials. The flare-up reflects ongoing territorial tensions in the region.
content: The flare-up came before Rubio is expected to visit Manila for meetings of Southeast Asian foreign ministers, with Chinese diplomat Wang Yi also in attendance.

zh.title: 菲律宾水手在争议浅滩受伤后 美国谴责中国"危险且咄咄逼人"的行为
zh.summary: 一名菲律宾水手在争议浅滩处受伤，引发美国谴责中国的行为。该事件发生在涉及东南亚和中国官员的地区外交会议期间。这次升级反映了该地区持续存在的领土紧张关系。

title: Trump slaps 50% tariffs on Canada and Carney vows to 'intensify' trade talks
summary: The Trump administration has imposed 50% tariffs on Canadian goods, marking a significant escalation in North American trade tensions. Canada has vowed to intensify trade negotiations in response. The move threatens to disrupt bilateral economic relations between the neighbors.
content: The duties mark a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours.

zh.title: 特朗普对加拿大征收50%关税 卡尼誓言"加强"贸易谈判
zh.summary: 特朗普政府对加拿大商品征收50%关税，标志着北美贸易紧张局势的重大升级。加拿大已承诺加强贸易谈判作为回应。此举威胁到两个邻国之间的双边经济关系。

title: U.S. hits Canada with stiff new tariffs, escalating trade tensions
summary: The Trump administration announced 50% tariffs on certain Canadian goods, citing discriminatory trade practices by Ottawa against U.S. automobiles, dairy, and alcohol industries. The tariffs represent a major policy shift targeting perceived trade imbalances. This escalates ongoing North American trade disputes.
content: The Trump administration on Monday said it would slap 50% tariffs on some goods imported from Canada, in an effort to end what it sees as discriminatory trade practices by Ottawa against the U.S. automobile, dairy and alcohol industries.

zh.title: 美国对加拿大实施严厉新关税，加剧贸易紧张局势
zh.summary: 特朗普政府宣布对某些加拿大商品征收50%的关税，理由是渥太华对美国汽车、乳制品和酒精产业的歧视性贸易行为。这些关税代表了针对感知到的贸易失衡的重大政策转变。这加剧了正在进行的北美贸易争端。
